title: The latest in data centers, AI, and energy
summary: Massive new data centers are the physical foundation for tech companies’ hopes and dreams for AI. title: RPA matters, but AI changes how automation works
summary: RPA (robotic process automation) is a practical and proven way to reduce manual work in business processes without AI systems. By using software bots to follow fixed rules, companies can automate repetitive tasks like data entry and invoice processing, and to a certain extent, report generation.
